description: Test dataset for search authority reranking. Each quote_test names a distinctive phrase from a known primary source and the patterns we expect in the top-1 hit's title or author. The top hit must match any one of the patterns. authority_queries is used for aggregate statistics (no per-query expected source, just top-1 authority distribution).

quote_tests.q: O Son of Spirit My first counsel is this
the best beloved of all things in My sight is Justice
O Son of Being love Me that I may love thee
O Son of Man I loved thy creation hence I created thee
The light of a good character surpasseth the light of the sun
O Son of Spirit Noble have I created thee
My love is My stronghold he that entereth therein is safe
Busy not thyself with this world for with fire We test the gold
O Son of Man veiled in My immemorial being
O Son of Justice Whither can a lover go but to the land of his beloved
The wayfarer on the path of love is he whose head is bowed to the earth
Be generous in prosperity and thankful in adversity
Bring thyself to account each day ere thou art summoned to a reckoning
O Friend In the garden of thy heart plant naught but the rose of love
Judge thou fairly and speak truly
The first duty prescribed by God for His servants is the recognition of Him
Recite ye the verses of God every morn and eventide
God hath prescribed unto every one the duty of writing a will
O Kings of the earth Give ear unto the Voice of God
Take heed lest the desire of leadership turn you aside
No man shall attain the shores of the ocean of true understanding
the essence of faith is fewness of words and abundance of deeds
O Brother know that true search is seeking a lost pearl
The earth is but one country and mankind its citizens
Ye are the fruits of one tree and the leaves of one branch
Consort with all religions with amity and concord
The well-being of mankind its peace and security are unattainable
Let your vision be world-embracing rather than confined to your own self
Should any one arise for the triumph of Our Cause him will God render victorious
That one indeed is a man who today dedicateth himself to the service of the entire human race
O ye that dwell on earth The religion of God is for love and unity
I ask of God to enable the leaders of religion to attain the presence of the All-Possessing
Is there any Remover of difficulties save God
Out of my troubled heart I call upon the Lord
I bear witness O my God that Thou hast created me to know Thee
Blessed is the spot and the house and the place
He is the compassionate the all merciful Praise be to God the Lord of all worlds
Well is it with him who fixeth his gaze upon the Order of Bahá'u'lláh
I am the Primal Point from which have been generated all created things
The Point of the Bayán manifesteth and the One promised by Him
When a thought of war comes oppose it by a stronger thought of peace
Love is the greatest law that rules this mighty and heavenly cycle
If religion becomes a cause of dislike hatred and division it were better to be without it
All the prophets of God have come with one same purpose
The human spirit which distinguishes man from the animal is the rational soul
The reality of divinity cannot be comprehended nor the essence of the Almighty
Nature is subjected to an absolute organization to determined laws
Man is the supreme Talisman Lack of a proper education hath deprived him
The source of perfect unity and love in the world of existence is the prophets of God
Knowledge is love Study love this is love
O God My God Fill my glass with the wine of forgiveness
The unity of mankind as envisaged by Bahá'u'lláh implies the establishment
The fundamental principle enunciated by Bahá'u'lláh is that religious truth is relative
The dispensation of Bahá'u'lláh is the Day promised by all the Messengers
The call of Bahá'u'lláh is primarily directed against all forms of provincialism
In the beginning God created the heaven and the earth
The Lord is my shepherd I shall not want
Thou shalt love thy neighbour as thyself
I am that I am hath sent me unto you
Let there be light and there was light and God saw the light that it was good
The Lord bless thee and keep thee The Lord make his face shine upon thee
Hear O Israel The Lord our God is one Lord
Thou shalt not kill Thou shalt not steal
By the rivers of Babylon there we sat down yea we wept
To everything there is a season and a time to every purpose under the heaven
The wolf also shall dwell with the lamb and the leopard shall lie down with the kid
For unto us a child is born unto us a son is given
Create in me a clean heart O God and renew a right spirit within me
Thy word is a lamp unto my feet and a light unto my path
Out of the depths have I cried unto thee O Lord
The fear of the Lord is the beginning of wisdom
He hath shewed thee O man what is good to do justly and love mercy
Beat their swords into plowshares and their spears into pruning hooks
The earth is the Lord and the fulness thereof the world and they that dwell therein
Blessed is the man that walketh not in the counsel of the ungodly
Trust in the Lord with all thine heart and lean not unto thine own understanding
For God so loved the world that he gave his only begotten Son
In the beginning was the Word and the Word was with God and the Word was God
Blessed are the poor in spirit for theirs is the kingdom of heaven
Blessed are the peacemakers for they shall be called the children of God
I am the way the truth and the life no man cometh unto the Father but by me
Come unto me all ye that labour and are heavy laden and I will give you rest
Our Father which art in heaven Hallowed be thy name Thy kingdom come
The kingdom of God is within you
Judge not that ye be not judged
And now abideth faith hope charity these three but the greatest of these is charity
When I was a child I spake as a child I understood as a child
Greater love hath no man than this that a man lay down his life for his friends
I am the vine ye are the branches
Render therefore unto Caesar the things which are Caesars and unto God the things that are Gods
Blessed are they that mourn for they shall be comforted
Behold I stand at the door and knock if any man hear my voice
I am Alpha and Omega the beginning and the end the first and the last
Love your enemies bless them that curse you do good to them that hate you
Ask and it shall be given you seek and ye shall find knock and it shall be opened
A new commandment I give unto you That ye love one another
The spirit indeed is willing but the flesh is weak
Let not your heart be troubled ye believe in God believe also in me
In my Fathers house are many mansions
Except a man be born of water and of the Spirit he cannot enter into the kingdom
Consider the lilies of the field how they grow they toil not neither do they spin
In the name of Allah the most gracious the most merciful
Allah is the light of the heavens and the earth
Verily with hardship comes ease after difficulty comes relief
Say He is Allah the One Allah the Eternal Refuge
Whoever kills a soul unless for a soul it is as if he killed all mankind
There is no compulsion in religion truth stands out clear from error
To God belongs the east and the west wheresoever ye turn thither is the presence of God
Allah does not burden a soul beyond that which it can bear every soul
Guide us to the straight path the path of those whom Thou hast blessed
And We sent not any messenger except with the language of his people
Whenever righteousness declines and unrighteousness rises I make myself manifest
You have the right to work but not to the fruits of your work
The soul is neither born nor does it die it is unborn eternal everlasting
All that we are is the result of what we have thought
Hatred does not cease by hatred but only by love this is the eternal rule
Better than a thousand useless words is one useful word
Ahura Mazda the wise lord of the seven immortals
Bahaullah hidden words
Bahaulah hiden words
Baha u llah most holy book

Kitabi Iqan
